atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain following a trampoline injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain began approximately four days ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a popping sensation at the time of injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports significant swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes ibuprofen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient applies ice to the knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty with weight-bearing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports limited range of motion with flexion and extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain on the inside of the knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals significant right knee swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with palpation on the medial aspect of the knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with range of motion testing

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects a medial collateral ligament (MCL) sprain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a straight leg brace for right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes mobic for pain relief and to reduce inflammation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI of the right knee to evaluate for further injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The MRI shows evaluation for further injury of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes metformin 500 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess progress and adjust treatment as needed.
